author: Steve G.
pros: It's easy to set up campaigns and get daily tracking numbers. Support does a good job of getting back with you.
cons: Rank tracking is about all you're going to get with this and it comes at a pretty high cost compared to some other solutions.

review_title: Our primary rank tracking solution we used every day to track thousands of rankings.
author: Calin H.
pros: This is one of the simplest rank tracking solutions out there. The interface and UI are fantastic and very easy to read. Pretty much the only reason they have been our rank tracking solution is how user-friendly and easy to understand the dashboard is. We can send the individualized dashboards to clients via simple URL so they can check their rankings each day which is fantastic for those high maintenance clients. You can see which way rankings are trending at a glance which is a great way to spot problems in campaigns and address them proactively. The daily rank tracking was super important and they do a very good job at it. The ability to go back 30 days, 90 days, or all time gives you some very good options for comparing rankings. You can also pick specific date ranges which gives you even more flexibility to show clients what is happening in their campaign. Customer service is prompt and very helpful via the chat feature. We track tens of thousands of keywords daily and AuthorityLabs was really the best solution for what we were looking for. Really, if you are looking for a rank tracking service that is easy to understand and looks good you can't do any better.
cons: Once you start tracking a lot of keywords this becomes pretty expensive compared to other services that will do bulk tracking. If you need to get a hold of someone you're pretty much limited to chat, which is okay but not as good as having someone available on the phone. Reps were reactive rather than proactive in most cases. We also ran into some strange issues with keywords not being tracked correctly or needing to refresh URLs often because tracking would break when you would switch to a different time frame. These were fairly infrequent though and relatively minor.

The team is available and friendly and will walk you through anything you need.
cons: I don't have a least. Over the years they made everything so good that it is perfect. Not joking.

description: It works great and it is an accurate keyword rank tracker.
author: Dexter T.
pros: The Keyword Rank Checker tool by SERPs is an accurate tool to track keywords. The layout is neat and it is easy to use as well. Inside their dashboard, I can easily view a lot of data about my keywords like my ranking data, top pages and backlinks data. They can track Google and Yahoo results as well as mobile and desktop results.
cons: Their pricing is a little bit higher than the competition.

review_title: Simple but great rank tracking software
author: Elaine S.
pros: SERPs is a simple rank tracking software that helps me to monitor my website's rankings. They also offer a free 30 day trial to test them out. Currently, I am subscribed to their Small Business plan. The plan allows me to monitor up to 300 keywords and five websites. The rank tracker is simple to use and it is accurate. It also updates the rankings of my keywords every 24 hours.
cons: Their pricing is higher than their competitors.

description: We liked the data we get through Authority Labs and especially the data through the API, that was probably the most benefit to us.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The dashboard was simple and intuitive, allowing you to easily see the data you want quickly.
cons: The keyword limits, as always, were limiting, especially if you were tracing a large enterprise site.

author: Matthew S.
pros: Keyword Rank Checker is a nice program for checking your site's rankings. They offer a free trial for you to test out their software. It also has a free version, although you need to type your keyword manually and it only allows you to check one keyword at a time. The rank tracker is pretty accurate and it also shows the top 250 websites who ranks for that keyword, the CPC data and search volume.
cons: It is a little bit expensive but the rank tracker is powerful and accurate.
